content: We can frame the original task-agnostic Self-Refine framework as a base scaffolding that can be augmented with the multiple inconsistent perspectives at the core of existing LLM self-reflection mechanisms to create a new multi-perspective self-refinement pipeline. This hybrid framework would retain Self-Refine’s key advantage of requiring no additional training or labeled data, while addressing the common failure mode of single-perspective self-feedback where LLMs fail to catch their own blind spots.
